title: Better Vanilla Jukebox
body:
# This pack tries to improve the jukebox while retaining the vanilla aesthetic.

![Jukebox showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b125466ac2d979ec6b7f31e159554d67196ab0.png)

## Features:
- Better Top Textures
- Animated Rotating Disc
- Full PBR!
